duplicate_boundary_checks.result: This run-local proof mirrors continuation parent-15 for the current task id so expanded-policy gap-proof validation can bind evidence to ai-infra-expansion-continuation-20260708-continuation-002-task-1.

gap_reason: The local corpus already contained an official JaguarMicro Yunxiao DPU announcement with one source-visible, schema-supported field: high-performance 2x25G Ethernet. The safe catalog boundary is a single DPU product row resolving aggregate 50 Gb/s network bandwidth, while the announcement's protocol, virtio, elastic network/storage, security, QoS, migration, upgrade, and cloud-disk boot text remains boundary evidence outside current resolved fields.
non_promoted_boundaries: No JaguarMicro RoCE v1/v2, iWARP, NVMe-oF, VLAN, VXLAN, GRE, Geneve, L2VPN, virtio, elastic network/storage, security isolation, QoS, hot-plug, live migration, hot upgrade, cloud-disk boot, memory, host-interface, power, benchmark, production-operation, service-SLO, training-throughput, inference-throughput, ranking, or aggregate-system claim was promoted as a resolved catalog field.
No protocol-level storage-fabric, benchmark, operations, or SLO claim was generalized from the JaguarMicro announcement.
No new external source was fetched, and no crawler subscriptions or Domain Channels were changed.
